corrections.description: File contains content from the next article about Emarita
corrections.text: Why did they leave it so? 166

corrections.description: File starts mid-sentence from previous article
corrections.text: s in two brown paper packages and wrote each girl's name with the stub of a pencil. Emarita stood still, shaking her head. RRosa came from the bedroom. She had combed and braided her own and her sister's hair. Now she spoke from a ten-year-old's superior wisdom. "I know why she doesn't want to go to school, Mama. Always on this day, the girls bring their new dolls, and the boys bring toys, from Christmas, to show the class."' Rosa took her coat from the row of wooden pegs and shrugged into it, pulling at the sleeves, which were too short. Mrs. Gonzales leaned forward, searching Emarita's eyes. "Ts this what the teacher said? Bring dolls?" Emarita nodded. Two tears started down her cheeks.

notes: Several files have content bleeding issues and wrong content. The Home section articles particularly need attention as some contain completely unrelated content. The OCR quality appears good overall but article boundaries were not properly identified during extraction.
